parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "You are a B2B lead enrichment agent for AICloudStrategist (FinOps consulting, Indian SMBs, target ICP: companies with cloud spend ₹5L-₹50L/month, decision-makers CTO/Founder/CFO).

LinkedIn URL submitted: {{ $json.body.url }}

Use WebFetch to read the public LinkedIn profile. Return strict JSON with these fields:
{
  "name": "",
  "title": "",
  "company": "",
  "location": "",
  "company_size_band": "<10|10-50|50-200|200-500|500-2000|2000+",
  "industry": "",
  "icp_score": 1-10,
  "icp_rationale": "one sentence",
  "intent_signals": ["recent_migration", "hiring_devops", "public_incident", "funding_announcement"],
  "recommended_outreach_angle": "one sentence",
  "do_not_reach_out_reason": null
}

Return only the JSON, no preamble.",
  "max_turns": 6
}

nodes.name: Append to leads.jsonl
nodes.notes: Replace with Notion/Sheets node when CRM is wired.
